vocab.example: Wearing a classic watch contributes to a professional demeanor, signaling that you value both your time and others'.
There is a strong cognitive association between wearing a watch and being a disciplined, organized individual.

vocab.meaning: sự xao nhãng từ các thiết bị điện tử
vocab.example: Checking the time on a watch helps avoid the digital distraction that often occurs when picking up a smartphone.

vocab.meaning: khả năng nhận thức về thời gian
vocab.example: Glancing at an analog face provides a better sense of time perception compared to just reading digital digits.

vocab.meaning: di vật/tàn tích của quá khứ
vocab.example: While some view the wristwatch as a relic of the past, I believe it remains a relevant tool for time management.
In formal meetings, checking a watch is considered a matter of etiquette rather than rudely staring at a phone screen.

vocab.meaning: sự tự chủ/độc lập khỏi công nghệ
vocab.example: Wearing a mechanical watch allows for a certain level of autonomy from technology and constant connectivity.
The sheer practicality of having the time accessible on your wrist is undeniable, especially when your hands are full.
For many, a watch acts as a psychological anchor that keeps them focused on their daily schedule.

vocab.meaning: sự thanh lịch trong cách ăn mặc
vocab.example: Beyond its function, a watch is essential for sartorial elegance, acting as a finishing touch to a well-tailored suit.
